name: reconstruction_specialized_b4_synthetic_seed42_v1
purpose: Record the proposed B4 transport labels without treating them as executable evidence until canonical HoRU implements their documented semantics.
limitations: Canonical HoRU does not implement these transport labels; no B4 numerical output may be reported.
The pinned manuscript only specifies uploading common/global coefficients and does not define compression, dropout, skip, or bit-flip corruption semantics.
